uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds GNSS uplink; lat/lon/alt/speed/hdop/sats verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (frame.lat=40.12345, frame.lon=-74.05678, used_sat=11, in_movement=true). batteryPercent=charge bits (72), powerSource from bit0.

uplink.description: GNSS fix with serial number + temperature frame, external power, stationary (Sydney)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds uplink (is_sn set). Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js: frame.lat=-33.85678, frame.lon=151.21345, used_sat=7, in_movement=false, temperature_cel=23.7, sn=123456.

uplink.description: WiFi-scan + movement uplink (upstream example) — cloud-solved, no on-device position
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input (the 'personnal tracker' sample): a movement frame then a WiFi scan. WiFi geolocation is cloud-solved, so position.* is intentionally NOT emitted; access points go to the wifiAccessPoints extra. battery_pct=97 and the two MACs/RSSIs match reference/upstream-codec.js output.
Single byte cannot carry the 2-byte header; codec rejects it.
